## 100M CONVERSION SECRETS (73 elementos)

Live workshop at Boardroom event hosted by Brian Kurtz. Jon Benson teaches his complete VSL system to elite direct-response copywriters. Includes live case study dissections of Porter Stansberry's "End of America" VSL.

**Key Frameworks:**
- 5-Step VSL Process (live version with audience Q&A)
- 1-2-3-4 Formula (ONE USP, TWO Stories, THREE Tips, FOUR Comparisons)
- Grand Offer Architecture (6 parts, 13 sub-parts)
- Triple Guarantee (30-day/60-day/anytime)
- Nightmare Story Construction (date/time/weather specificity)
- Three Trust Keys (Modesty + Honesty + Determination)
- Villain Construction System
- Pattern Interrupt Object Technique
- Red Highlighted Subliminal Sentences
- Hybrid Animation VSL Model

**Key Heuristics:**
- Q&A adds 20-30% conversions
- Checkout walkthrough = 21% lift
- Slide pacing at 70 BPM (heart rate)
- Lower volume = 25% more conversions (Deiss test)
- Faux price works 75% of time (Belfort insight: give REASON)
- Hidden buy button = 83% increase
- USP in 20 words or less

---

## 28-DAY PRODUCT CREATION FORMULA (78 elementos)

Complete 4-week system for creating info products from scratch. Week 4 features Miles Baker on ClickBank setup.

**Key Frameworks:**
- 28-Day Product Formula (4 weeks)
- 3-Section Book Structure (12 chapters: intro + info + tactics)
- Triple Product Creation (audio + ebook + video from one recording)
- Get Paid To Create System (sell before product exists)
- Kindle Free Book Funnel (Amazon as free advertising)
- Opt-In Page Formula (benefit WITHOUT pain)
- ClickBank Order Page Optimization

**Key Heuristics:**
- Neil Strauss 25% First Pass Rule
- 7th grade reading level max
- 75% affiliate commission standard
- 90% cart abandonment rate
- 25-35% Kindle-to-opt-in conversion
- Custom billing = 50% fewer refunds
- Video walkthrough = 30-40% of total income

---

## 3X VSL FAST TRACK (35 elementos)

Accelerated VSL creation workshop — condensed version of the main course.

**Key Additions:**
- 13-Part Grand Offer Structure (detailed)
- Triple Price Drop-Down technique
- Pain-Pleasure-Action Close sequence
- VSL Cause Marketing Framework
- "Investment Not Price" reframing

---

## TRAFFIC PROS (47 elementos)

10-issue newsletter featuring multiple traffic experts:
- **Bret Gregory** — Facebook traffic, article stacking
- **Dan Rose** — YouTube to VSL pipeline (Mike Chang method)
- **Dean Jackson / Nate Mohr** — Ad-to-page congruency (3% CTR, 50% opt-in)
- **Keith Baxter** — SEO affiliate review sites ($160K from $15K)
- **Jeff Johnson** — VSL conversion optimization stack

**Key Frameworks:**
- Three Traffic Types (Toll Booth, Direct, Distraction)
- Facebook Article Stack Method
- YouTube Traffic-To-VSL Pipeline
- SEO Affiliate Review Site System
- RTB Banner Traffic System
- Ad-To-Page 100% Congruency System
- VSL Conversion Optimization Stack
- Nine Word Email Reactivation (Dean Jackson)

**Key Heuristics:**
- 3 cents per Facebook like ($6000 = 200K)
- 10K YouTube views = validated demand
- 50% opt-in from congruent ads
- 300% ROI minimum on Facebook (hyper-segmented)
- Countdown timer doubles conversions
- Hidden buy button = 83% increase
- Rule of Ones: $1 CPC x 1% conv x $100 = break even
